title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Casa Grande - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Casa Grande - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
